name: Hearty Irish Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle or Dutch oven, brown the meat in oil.
2. Add water, beef-flavor bouillon (3 cubes), and pepper. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 1 hour.
4. Add the remaining ingredients except cabbage. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Add cabbage and cover. Simmer for an additional 15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
6. Refrigerate leftovers.
